</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Lixisenatide 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Suliqua is indicated for the treatment of adults with insufficiently controlled type 2 diabetes mellitus to improve glycaemic control as an adjunct to diet and exercise in addition to metformin with...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>opsismodysplasia（97.6%）</li>
<li>focal stiff limb syndrome（97.5%）</li>
<li>classic stiff person syndrome（97.5%）</li>
<li>thiamine-responsive dysfunction syndrome（97.2%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus (disease)（97.2%）</li>
<li>drug-induced localized lipodystrophy（96.2%）</li>
<li>pancreatic agenesis（96.0%）</li>
<li>centrifugal lipodystrophy（96.0%）</li>
<li>pressure-induced localized lipoatrophy（95.9%）</li>
<li>idiopathic localized lipodystrophy（95.7%）</li>
<li>autoimmune oophoritis（82.0%）</li>
<li>type 1 diabetes mellitus（79.3%）</li>
<li>cholangiocarcinoma, susceptibility to（65.4%）</li>
<li>atrial flutter (disease)（64.5%）</li>
<li>hemoglobin C-beta-thalassemia syndrome（64.3%）</li>
<li>hypercarotenemia and vitamin A deficiency, autosomal recessive（62.0%）</li>
<li>retinal dystrophy with or without extraocular anomalies（61.8%）</li>
<li>pancreas, dorsal, agenesis of（60.9%）</li>
<li>familial chronic myelocytic leukemia-like syndrome（60.5%）</li>
<li>lymphopenic hypergammaglobulinemia, antibody deficiency, autoimmune hemolytic anemia, and glomerulonephritis（60.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
